name: Searing Smite
description: The next time you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack during the spell's duration, your weapon flares with white-hot intensity, and the attack deals an extra 1d6 fire damage to the target. On hit, the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or ignite, taking 1d6 fire damage at the start of each of its turns until it or another creature extinguishes the flames.
effect: Empowers next melee weapon hit with 1d6 extra fire damage; on hit target must save CON or ignite (1d6 fire per turn).
notes: On-hit rider: extra 1d6 fire on the triggering hit; secondary CON save or ignite (DoT) requires on-hit-rider + burning condition engine support — see proposals.
Shape: buff (no save on cast, no spell attack). Save_type removed from spell; secondary save noted here.
